욥기 17:1.content: “My spirit is consumed. My days are extinct, and the grave is ready for me.

욥기 17:2.content: Surely there are mockers with me. My eye dwells on their provocation.

욥기 17:3.content: “Now give a pledge. Be collateral for me with yourself. Who is there who will strike hands with me?

욥기 17:4.content: For you have hidden their heart from understanding, Therefore you will not exalt them.

욥기 17:5.content: He who denounces his friends for plunder, Even the eyes of his children will fail.

욥기 17:6.content: “But he has made me a byword of the people. They spit in my face.

욥기 17:7.content: My eye also is dim by reason of sorrow. All my members are as a shadow.

욥기 17:8.content: Upright men will be astonished at this. The innocent will stir himself up against the godless.

욥기 17:9.content: Yet the righteous will hold to his way. He who has clean hands will grow stronger and stronger.

욥기 17:10.content: But as for you all, come back. I will not find a wise man among you.

욥기 17:11.content: My days are past. My plans are broken off, as are the thoughts of my heart.

욥기 17:12.content: They change the night into day, saying ‘The light is near’ in the presence of darkness.

욥기 17:13.content: If I look for Sheol as my house, if I have spread my couch in the darkness,

욥기 17:14.content: if I have said to corruption, ‘You are my father;’ to the worm, ‘My mother,’ and ‘My sister,’

욥기 17:15.content: where then is my hope? as for my hope, who will see it?

욥기 17:16.content: Shall it go down with me to the gates of Sheol, or descend together into the dust?”
